model: v20clean 3-seed club ensemble + v21goal blend w=0.65 (lineup-aware)
confirmed_lineup_note: Both XIs 11/11 from ESPN summary (event 401896225). 14/22 player embeddings matched, LOPSIDED: Vojvodina (home) only 4/11 matched, Ajax (away) 10/11 matched.

bets.staking_method: Half-Kelly/8%-cap formula gave EUR16 (cap-bound, +21.6pp edge, +132% EV); HALVED to EUR8 by explicit user decision -- Vojvodina's own confirmed XI matched only 4/11 embeddings (vs Ajax 10/11), the same lopsided-thin-data shape that produced fake edges on Qarabag/Paide earlier today. Edge judged only partially trustworthy.

excluded_legs_note: Draw (-1.2pp edge, -4.8% EV) and Away win (Ajax, -27.6pp edge, -41.9% EV) both excluded as no-bets.
data_note: 14/22 total embeddings, lopsided 4/11 (Vojvodina) vs 10/11 (Ajax) -- home-side edge downsized to half formula size on data-trust grounds, same treatment as bets #18-19.
provenance_note: Prediction generated pre-kickoff from confirmed XIs; bet placed at Unibet around the 18:00Z kickoff; this commit logged minutes after kickoff, before any result information. Not a pre-kickoff-proof pick per the strict standard.
